commands.review_summary:
This PR adds global/default/per-agent internal hook policy config, applies it during internal hook dispatch, threads config through hook call sites, and updates hooks/config docs plus regression tests.

Reproducibility: yes. for the blocking PR bug by source inspection: configure agents.defaults.hooks.events to only allow command:new, dispatch gateway:startup with config but no agent id, and PR-head code resolves a default agent before applying the allowlist. This was not live-run in the read-only review.
commands.review_followup: Human review is needed before merge because this is a new hook-policy config surface with a security-sensitive scope bug, missing contributor real behavior proof, and a conflicting stale branch.
